name: What Makes a Good Social Media Management Tool? with Lauren Freund
episode_summary: Lauren Freund, Social Media @ Canva. Lauren has been working in the marketing field for the past decade and specializing in the area of social and digital media for brands like Taco Bell, Shutterfly, and more! She has a passion for building a strong social strategy and connecting with communities through storytelling in the world of social media.
episode_summary_rich_text:
In this video, Madeleine, the host of the podcast, talks to Lauren Freund, a social media manager at Canva, about all things social media. Key takeaways include:

  • Social media management is an ever-changing and exciting field that requires constant learning and experimentation.
  • Successful social media management involves understanding the unique audience and needs of each brand.
  • Tools such as Canva can empower creativity and make social media content creation easier.
  • Testing and learning is important for social media success and there are no true failures, only opportunities to learn and improve.
